title: NSC Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website built with React and Vite to showcase research, projects, and experience. Features dynamic JSON-driven content, media embeddings, and a responsive design.
highlights: Video and photo media per item

title: AI Code Review Tool
description: An automated code review system powered by large language models that provides meaningful feedback on pull requests, detecting bugs, style issues, and security vulnerabilities.

title: Distributed Task Scheduler
description: A high-performance distributed task scheduling system built with Go that supports priority queues, cron-like scheduling, and fault tolerance.
